selectOpening: Select an opening your agency is assigned to
errNotAssigned: Your agency is not assigned to this opening
errCandidateNotFound: No candidate found with that handle
errDuplicate: You have already referred this candidate to this opening
errOpeningNotPublished: This opening is not open for referrals
noAssignableAgencies: No staffing subscriptions yet. Subscribe to a staffing provider in the marketplace first.
noAgencyWarning: No agency assigned — nobody can apply yet.
dashboardDescription: Refer candidates into openings your agency staffs for
accessDenied: You don't have permission to view agency referrals.
loadError: Could not load referrals. Please try again.
noOpenings: No openings assigned to your agency yet
noReferralsOpening: No referrals yet for this opening
noStaffingClients: No staffing clients yet. A client appears here once it subscribes to your staffing service in the marketplace.
defaultsIntro: Choose who handles each client by default. New openings from that client are assigned to this person automatically. Changing it later never affects openings that are already assigned.
needsReassignmentBanner_one: {{count}} opening needs a new assignee. A lead must reassign it.
needsReassignmentBanner_other: {{count}} openings need a new assignee. A lead must reassign them.
inactiveAssigneeError: That recruiter is no longer active. Pick someone else.
notAssignedError: This opening is not assigned to your agency.
